build_system: pnpm@10.28.1 with turbo for task orchestration. Each package has its own package.json with scripts: typecheck, test, build.
test_framework: Vitest ^2 with globals:true. Tests go in src/__tests__/*.test.ts. Import from vitest: describe, it, expect, beforeEach. Import source modules with .js extension.
verification_instructions: 1. Run typecheck: npx tsc --noEmit -p packages/observability/tsconfig.json 2. Run tests: NODE_OPTIONS="" npx vitest run packages/observability/src/__tests__/
setup_instructions: pnpm install in root directory. Node >=22 and pnpm@10.28.1 already available.
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode - can install from npm registries. No Docker daemon needed for validation.
contribution_requirements: TypeScript strict mode, ESNext modules with bundler resolution, composite project references. Tests use vitest with .js extensions on imports.
key_patterns: Packages follow pattern: package.json (name: @quant/xxx), tsconfig.json (extends ../../tsconfig.json), src/index.ts barrel, src/types.ts for types, src/core/ for implementations, src/__tests__/ for tests. Classes with clear constructor/method pattern. No external OTel SDK dependency needed - implement concepts in-house matching existing patterns.
directory_structure: packages/observability/src/ - main source, packages/observability/src/core/ - class implementations, packages/observability/src/__tests__/ - test files (to create)
